title: Compliance: C link_ctx.c replay protection
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.4. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c. Status: COMPLIANT. Lines 67-84 initialize epoch to 128+(rand&0x7F) giving [128,255]. Uses sys_csrand_get on Zephyr, getentropy on POSIX. Security note for ESP32 weak RNG documented.
